rationale: Section 11.1827 governs community land trust exemptions, which are separate from and additional to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b). Changing the homestead exemption amount does not alter or conflict with §11.1827's operative provisions.
quote: In addition to any other exemption to which the trust may be entitled, a community land trust is entitled to an exemption from taxation by a taxing unit of land owned by the trust
_note: No cross-reference to §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts appears in §11.1827. The two exemptions operate independently.
